summary: Iteration 73 - Security & Functional Audit Complete. 21/22 backend tests passed (95.5%). Security endpoints properly protected, login works with credentials, rate limiting active, sensitive fields (pin_hash, hashed_password) never returned in API responses. All cooperative endpoints functional. Frontend verified: Login flow works, Dashboard shows quick actions, Members page has Add Member modal with PIN and Hectares fields.

minor.issue: Test skipped - Pydantic validation returns 422 as expected but test was skipped due to fixture issue

integration_issues.issue: Transient 'Erreur lors du chargement des membres' error shown - may be session/auth timing issue

critical_code_review_comments: SECURITY PASS: GET /api/auth/admin/password-health/{email} returns 401/403 without auth token
SECURITY PASS: POST /api/auth/admin/repair-password returns 401/403 without auth token
SECURITY PASS: Login works with credentials (admin: klenakan.eric@gmail.com, coop: bielaghana@gmail.com)
SECURITY PASS: Rate limiting active on login endpoint (10/minute)
SECURITY PASS: hashed_password and pin_hash NEVER returned in API responses
SECURITY PASS: CORS configured with explicit allowed origins (not wildcard *)
FUNCTIONAL PASS: POST /api/cooperative/members creates member with PIN and hectares, returns code_planteur and pin_configured
FUNCTIONAL PASS: GET /api/cooperative/lots returns lot data
FUNCTIONAL PASS: GET /api/cooperative/parcels/all returns parcels
FUNCTIONAL PASS: GET /api/cooperative/distributions returns distribution data
FUNCTIONAL PASS: GET /api/cooperative/agents returns agent list
FUNCTIONAL PASS: GET /api/cooperative/members/activation-stats returns stats
FUNCTIONAL PASS: GET /api/cooperative/members/export?format=xlsx returns valid Excel file
FUNCTIONAL PASS: GET /api/cooperative/dashboard returns dashboard data
FUNCTIONAL PASS: GET /api/cooperative/harvests returns harvest data
FUNCTIONAL PASS: POST /api/auth/login accepts 'identifier' field (not 'email')
WEB PASS: Login flow works - redirects to /cooperative/dashboard
WEB PASS: Dashboard shows cooperative name, code, stats, and quick actions
WEB PASS: Quick actions navigate to correct routes (/cooperative/parcels/new, /cooperative/members, /cooperative/lots, /cooperative/distributions, /cooperative/reports, /cooperative/agents)
WEB PASS: Add Member modal has PIN field (data-testid='member-pin-input') and Hectares field (data-testid='member-hectares-input')
seed_data_creation: Test members created during testing with unique phone numbers (+225070073XXXX format)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Security audit complete: 1) Admin endpoints (password-health, repair-password) now require authentication - returns 401/403 without token. 2) Hardcoded passwords removed from auth.py - login still works via database hashed passwords. 3) CORS uses explicit allowed origins. 4) Rate limiting active on login (10/minute). 5) Sensitive fields (pin_hash, hashed_password) never returned in API responses. 6) All cooperative endpoints functional. 7) Frontend Add Member modal has PIN and Hectares fields with proper data-testid attributes. Orange Money and SMS are MOCKED.

mocked_api_note.Orange Money API: MOCKED - payments logged but not actually processed
mocked_api_note.Orange SMS API: MOCKED - SMS logged but not sent
